# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
    name: my-service-account
    properties:
      accountId: my-service-account-id
      projectId: my-project-id

  - type: iam.v1.serviceAccountKey
    name: my-service-account-key
    dependsOn:
      - my-service-account
    properties:
      parent: projects/my-project-id/serviceAccounts/my-service-account-id@my-project-id.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      privateKeyType: TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE
      publicKeyType: NONE

  - type: storage.v1.bucket
    name: my-bucket
    properties:
      location: US-EAST4
      storageClass: STANDARD
      iamConfiguration:
        uniformBucketLevelAccess:
          enabled: true

  - type: storage.v1.object
    name: my-service-account-key-object
    dependsOn:
      - my-service-account-key
    properties:
      bucket: my-bucket
      name: my-service-account-key.json
      mediaContent:
        $ref: $.outputs[?name=='my-service-account-key-file'].evaluatedValue

outputs:
  - name: my-service-account-key-file
    value: $(ref.my-service-account-key.privateKeyData)
